title: Warkop DKI Reborn: Jangkrik Boss Part 1
original_title: Warkop DKI Reborn: Jangkrik Boss! Part 1
overview: Dono, Kasino, and Indro returned to action in the midst of the hustle and bustle of Jakarta. They once again acted as personnels of a private institution named CHIIPS.
